payload.title: Unblock DBA & Resolve Stale Run
payload.prompt: Approve permission escalation for EAV-197 and authorize cancellation of stale run 26bf4491?
payload.summary: DBA is silent (EAV-202) because it is blocked on EAV-197 (Permission Denied on Mirror DB). I have reviewed the SQL (docs/EAV_DBA_TRIGRAM_EXPANSION_EAV-194.sql) and it is safe. Request: 1) Approve the permission escalation (288b7547) for superuser execution. 2) Authorize the cancellation of the stale DBA run (26bf4491) to allow a clean restart once permissions are granted.
